Main program, configuration, build files, and setup instructions for JerryScript on NuttX STM32F4.


## Files
- **[jerry_main.c](jerry_main.c.md)**: Main program for JerryScript on NuttX STM32F4, handling script execution and logging.
- **[Kconfig](Kconfig.md)**: Configuration options for enabling and setting parameters of the Jerryscript ECMAScript 5.1 interpreter.
- **[Make.defs](Make.defs.md)**: Conditional inclusion of the JerryScript interpreter in the build configuration for Nuttx STM32F4.
- **[Makefile](Makefile.md)**: Makefile for building the JerryScript application on the NuttX STM32F4 platform with specific configurations.
- **[README.md](README.md.md)**: Instructions for setting up and running JerryScript on the STM32F4-Discovery board with NuttX.
